item.title: She’s a real one.
item.description: I feel comfortable calling this woman the modern Mr. Rogers. What an example to follow. “Preach the Gospel at all times. If necessary use words.”
item.dc:creator: rabbihimself

item.title: Random Animal Dump
item.dc:creator: BuckFudddy

item.title: Sweet, sweet satisfaction
item.description:
Drama ensued. TL;DR: meme says it all. I got a fantastic job. I work in a niche field that’s only been around for a few decades and I’ve been doing it for 13 years. At my orientation, the top brass introduced themselves and said “you’re the gal with a lot of experience!” And I thought I had found a good place that saw beyond my gender. Unfortunately, the field is incredibly unbalanced (average of one chick to 20 “macho” dudes and I was the only gal expert on this particular team). As a “macho” chick with a good sense of humor usually it doesn’t bother me. However… C-suite ex special-forces dude made up his mind I didn’t know what I was doing despite extensive experience, training, and knowledge in an abstract field. Mind you, I was a low level manager—three levels below this dude. Customers were satisfied (quantitatively), fellow employees and boss sung my praises, but this guy shifted milestones daily and refused to talk to me directly, bullying my super fantastic but non-expert boss about irrelevant and literally impossible, ever-changing expectations. A particularly aggravating example: requiring a full-fledged curriculum on a product before engineering had even defined the features. I read an 800 page Navy training manual to try to speak this dude’s narrow language and I learned a lot from it but that’s not really relevant to the customer. The constant reproach started to take a toll on my health. He would throw his “examples” into chat gpt which most certainly is not trained on the particulars of this field, let alone the product. He fed me trash and I recycled what I could while translating the real requirements in simple terms to meet the mutual goal. It was more inefficient to parse through AI b.s. than to draft it myself by about 3x. Not that it made any difference. I went above my boss—with his knowledge—to the VP for a good strategy. Unfortunately, he was a spineless fish that looked like a macho guy but was really a Silicon Valley type. He said that he did me a disservice by not “selling me” (ew) to his boss and that it should shake out after six months and I was doing a great job. So I waited and kept trying, sinking my soul in a vain attempt to get the powerful bully off my back. Scheduled a meeting to directly talk with this thorny jerk which he canceled 3x in a row. And finally, I got his approval on a deliverable. I literally made the project plan to have his initials when he approved it and the next week, he pivoted and said it wasn’t good enough. I continuously try to improve and have a graduate-level certification in that particular area. After internal analysis, I was only able to conclude that the dude wanted me to quit. He was notorious for firing people; he gave an official strike to someone on my team, three levels down, who used the word “demonstrate” when asking for advice on how best to teach a feature. I kid you not. As a wise man with an equally badass background told me, “If you find yourself in an ambush, just get out of there. They are prepared to take you out and know the environment that they are working with better than you. They have the advantage. Get out, figure out how to respond, and then act.” It really stuck with me and after 3 months of being ambushed after every deliverable I provided, I quit. I warned my boss that he was getting the same treatment and that they were coming after him but he tried to ride it out. He was fired in an atrocious manner by the senior leader jerk two months later and what is worse—he and that C-suite guy were friends in the former badass life. Fast forward, C-suite guy got too big for his britches and staged a mini coup that backfired. He was canned and had actively sabotaged the department I had worked for, leaving it a mess. My boss’s replacement saw what I had done and really liked it and asked if I was interested in coming back. I think I will because I like the job and genuinely try to look out for the customers because I have been in their shoes, but if I hadn’t quit I wouldn’t have had the strength to get to this point. Take care of yourselves, friends. You deserve better than abuse, in any form. Learn, adapt, and walk away if it takes too much of a toll. I believe in you.
Cat tax
item.dc:creator: amaihai

item.title: My boy, out here saving lives.
item.description: Just like that one night my buddy Luigi was at a soup kitchen with me. Some CEO died that night. Made me think how fragile life is, and fire important it is to have your friends close

item.title: Two memes diverged
item.description:
R'amen
how indeed
If the war thunder devs made a minigame about raping minors, we would probably have the full unredacted Epstein files within a week.
This person is known as "young Bernie", despite the fact that he is clearly super old in this image. This is a reference to the fact that nobody has tried to fix any of America's problems in the last 50 years.
I'd go back to college if it meant being able to cast Eldritch Blast.
The invisible hand touched me in a bad place.
I want detailed numbers about the overlap between states and present here vs how they actually are, but I'm too lazy to do the math myself.
There's a certain frenchness
The username really makes this.
mostly I downloaded this image for the bebe turt, but the text is also quite amusing
"The beacons are lit! Gondor calls for dick!" Rohan: *seen at 9:01 PM*
Mama K is best girl. And best grill.
Yep.
Disenchantment was pretty good
Flesh and Blood TCG tax. What the heck is an "attack queue?"
item.dc:creator: BenjyX55

26 Man Tax: Alexander Becht
"The art of life is to know how to enjoy a little and to endure much." -William Hazlitt So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The Secret Industry Behind Trans Ragebait
item.description:
I finally talked about the weird “trans ragebait marketing” ecosystem because I know you all have noticed how manufactured they all feel... And I let you in on why.
Chatting at 7:30am PST this morn at the premiere! https://youtu.be/muD4K_2WrkE

item.title: Return of the meme: 1692 (your soul is in your keeping alone)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. (Bread by @andexer )
Conquests in Mayan warfare was often tied to where Venus was in the sky. These events are literally known as "Star Wars," because Mayan archeologists are nerds.
I had two dreams that I remember.
In the first, I was walking the streets of Istanbul at night, trying to find... something, I'm not sure what. Then I ran into my dad, who i had invited to meet me in Istanbul for a vacation from work, and we had the Turkish equivalent to Tapas (just small plates of food) and raki, over hookah, and he talked about work sabotage and the Paper Monster (his word he coined for bureaucracy) and was thanking me for helping him navigate it in his old age and was worried that mom would get an aneurysm or heartattack from all the stress of their situation, and he wished he knew how to do more. But he didn't, and he was so tired of having done all the work to care for her in her moments the last 20 years bit felt it was never good enough, and how he needed the vacation. The dawn call to prayer sounded. He understood why I loved this city so much and had moved here. I then woke up, plugged my phone in, and went back to sleep.
Second dream was a bit more frightening, I had baby Pippin, not completely with opened feathers and he was brushed by fire and had singed feathers and some tender skin. I was in a Walmart, looking for neosporin as a stop gap because I didn't actually knew what vets used for burns on birds and I didn't know who to reach and I was somehow very calm but the Walmart I was in didn't have anything useful, everything was designed so that only useless capitalist bullshit was being sold and all the medical stuff was hidden away in storage across the street per order of the administration, so I left and broke into a CVS with a brick and grabbed some neosporin and left a $50 bill on the shelf and put it on the burns of squirming baby Pippin and watched it magically heal and then was awakened as *THE* Pippin himself performed a chestburster, crawling out of a hole in my shirt to wake me up. (I sleep on my back because of my CPAP, so I don't roll around in my sleep. I have tried getting the Pippin to sleep in his cage, but he will open it himself to get out of the cage to sleep in my shirt. If I zip-tie it shut for the night, he would cry nonstop until I relented. Hilariously, this is the only time he will try to get out of his cage. If it's shut while cleaning or something, he doesn't try to open it.)
Or a Scrub-jay man if you're me.
I hate being wrong, but I would rather deal with the embarrassment of having been wrong rather than pretending I am right.
I really, seriously, want a pair of cowboy boots modified this way.
The food truck across the street from the jeep tour company makes the best Tacos el Pastor I've ever had outside of Mexico.
The process of making this scabbard is slow going. Originally I wanted to try and use only Bronze-age tech to do it, but i realized that if the makers of these had access to an electric sander, they'd fucking use it. So I'm going to borrow one from my coworkers. But I did use wood chisels to break the original Aspen log into shape.
Yeah this tracks.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin! Hey good boy. Be a good boy. Okay. Beep." _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
